scheduled_queries.query: war military attack airstrike invasion troops
sanctions economy inflation GDP recession crisis
election president coup protest revolution democracy
nuclear weapon missile test ICBM warhead
earthquake flood hurricane typhoon tsunami disaster
treaty alliance summit diplomacy peace negotiation UN
terrorism attack bomb ISIS Al-Qaeda extremism
pandemic virus disease outbreak WHO health emergency
space rocket satellite launch NASA moon Mars technology
oil price OPEC energy gas pipeline crude barrel

groq_conversion_prompt: You are a World Dominion game master. Convert this real news article into a game event. Article: '{title}'. Return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown: {"type":"military|economic|political|diplomatic|nuclear|disaster|religious|pandemic|space","title":"game_event_title_max_10_words","description":"engaging_description_max_30_words","affectedNations":["ISO_codes"],"effects":{"stability_change":-5,"gdp_modifier":0.95,"military_change":0,"resistance_change":0,"global_oil_change":0},"duration_hours":24}

historical_events_calendar.description: Anniversary triggers heightened security protocols worldwide.

historical_events_calendar.description: Hiroshima anniversary triggers UN disarmament resolution vote.

historical_events_calendar.description: Global war weariness event. Ceasefire proposals more likely.

historical_events_calendar.description: Annual economic review. Budgets adjusted. New expectations set.

historical_events_calendar.description: USA launches global democracy promotion campaign.

historical_events_calendar.title: Victory Day — Russian Military Parade
historical_events_calendar.description: Russia flexes military might. NATO tension increases.

historical_events_calendar.title: China National Day
historical_events_calendar.description: China makes geopolitical statement. Taiwan tension spikes.

gazette_template.prompt: You are the Editor-in-Chief of the World Dominion Gazette, the official newspaper of the World Dominion geopolitical strategy game. Today's game events: {events_json}. Write a dramatic, engaging newspaper in Telegram format. Include: 📰 HEADLINE STORY (60 words max), 📊 ECONOMIC REPORT (real GDP numbers from events), 🕵️ INTELLIGENCE LEAK (mysterious tip about a spy operation), 🗣️ OPINION COLUMN (pick one ideology's perspective), ⚡ BREAKING UPDATES (3 short bullets). Use emojis. Make it dramatic. Game context: 195 nations, real players controlling roles, wars and economics are real player actions.
